overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player moves along sidewalks beneath elevated highways, past digital billboards and futuristic architecture, eventually crossing a street intersection.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk beneath massive elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with support pillars
large illuminated billboard displaying VOTE text with red and white graphics
tall street light casting yellow-orange illumination on the sidewalk
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with red accent lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk illuminated by street lamps, with a large digital VOTE billboard visible ahead on the right. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with artificial lighting dominating the scene.

agents.ego_description: walking past building entrance with large illuminated advertisements, approaching stairs on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera along the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to building entrance with glass doors
large purple digital billboard displaying SET SAIL advertisement with holographic elements
modern glass and steel building front with illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the elevated highway into a commercial area featuring a building entrance with wide stairs. Bright digital advertisements including a prominent SET SAIL billboard illuminate the right side, while the VOTE billboard moves to the left as the camera passes. A single pedestrian walks ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with graffiti and standing pedestrians

events.description: passing group of NPCs standing against the building wall on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk passing pedestrians standing against the building wall

angled building corner with weathered concrete and small illuminated signs
scattered trash and paper littering the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along a narrower sidewalk section with a graffiti-covered wall on the right. Two NPCs stand against the wall near the corner of the building. The environment shows urban decay with debris on the ground, while distant neon towers remain visible ahead.

events.description: turning right and stepping onto crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at intersection, moving from sidewalk onto crosswalk markings

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving down the street in the distance

entered.detail: wide intersection of multi-lane roads with traffic signals
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
black traffic signal pole at corner of intersection
skyscraper covered in bright vertical neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and enters a wide street intersection, stepping onto the crosswalk. The scene opens up to reveal tall skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements in the distance. A futuristic vehicle drives by on the left as the camera crosses the asphalt road marked with white crosswalk lines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the oppressive shadow of an urban overpass into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving along a concrete sidewalk where artificial street lamps and a large digital VOTE billboard pierce the dark atmosphere. As the camera passes under the overpass, the scene opens into a commercial area illuminated by bright SET SAIL advertisements and wide building stairs, with a lone pedestrian visible in the distance. The path then narrows alongside a graffiti-covered wall and urban debris where NPCs linger in the shadows, before the camera turns right to enter a wide street intersection. Finally, the view expands across a marked crosswalk as a futuristic vehicle speeds by, revealing a towering skyline of neon skyscrapers under the night sky.
